subcodes.title: Words spoken at Dreyfus home in Paris, 1911-11-03
subcodes.first_line: The Religion of God, in truth, consisteth in deeds and not in mere words, for verily the Religion of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دین الله فی الحقیقه عبارت از اعمال است عبارت از الفاظ نیست زیرا دین الله
subcodes.subjects: @Christian doctrine and practice, @war and peace, @words vs deeds, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
